title: Appliances, Functions, Storage, and Cloud Connectivity · Incident Case: Net Cloud Gateways Connectivity
summary: Design service paths across physical and virtual devices, private cloud networks, public services, and storage. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net cloud gateways connectivity increment in a labeled hybrid-service path. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose internet, NAT, VPN, or dedicated cloud connectivity by direction, reachability, performance, and risk.
Explain NFV, VPC boundaries, security groups, security lists, subnets, route tables, and virtual gateways.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
